title: Crispy Saudi Arabian Lamb Skewers
description: Succulent, savory lamb cubes marinated with unwaxed lemon and aromatic spices, then air‑fried to a golden crisp. Perfect for a romantic dinner that stays kosher.
instructions: In a bowl combine the minced garlic, ground cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to form a spice paste.
Add the olive oil, lemon zest, and lemon juice to the spice paste, whisking until well blended.
Place the lamb cubes in the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinades. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours, to absorb flavors.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, spacing them evenly. Preheat the air fryer to 200°C (392°F).
Arrange the skewers in the air fryer basket in a single layer, ensuring they are not touching.
Air‑fry for 10–12 minutes, turning halfway through, until the lamb is cooked through and the exterior is crisp and golden.
Remove the skewers from the air fryer and let rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb skewers with a side of toasted flatbread, a simple cucumber–yogurt salad (use a plant‑based yogurt for kosher compliance), and a drizzle of extra‑virgin olive oil.
Optional: garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and a squeeze of lemon juice for brightness.
Enjoy the tender, aromatic lamb in a romantic Saudi Arabian style meal!
